author.name: Nicolas Finet
author.credentials: Built outbound systems for 500+ B2B companies. CEO of Sortlist & Overloop.

cta.headline: Ready to automate your outbound?
cta.description: Overloop finds prospects, writes personalized emails, and books meetings — powered by AI.

articles.keyword_en: how to find someone's email address
articles.brief: Definitive guide to finding email addresses. Methods: LinkedIn, company websites, email patterns, verification tools. Show Overloop's email finder with screenshots. Include free vs paid methods. Add data: average email find rate, verification accuracy.
articles.local_angle_fr: Methodes conformes RGPD/CNIL. Exemples d'adresses email professionnelles FR/BE.
articles.local_angle_es: Metodos conformes RGPD. Patrones de email corporativo en mercados hispanohablantes.

articles.brief: Step-by-step guide using Overloop Chrome extension. Screenshots of the process. Compare methods: manual export, Sales Navigator, Overloop extension, email guessing tools. Include LinkedIn privacy settings context.
articles.local_angle_de: LinkedIn-Nutzung in DACH. DSGVO bei LinkedIn-Datenextraktion.
articles.local_angle_fr: Usage LinkedIn en France/Belgique. RGPD et extraction de donnees LinkedIn.
articles.local_angle_es: Uso de LinkedIn en mercados hispanohablantes. Consideraciones legales.

articles.brief: SPOKE: AI BDR. Absorb content from ai-agent-tools page. Genuine testing with screenshots of each tool. Honest pros/cons. Overloop positioned #1 but with real justification. Include pricing comparison table. KD 2, already pos 2.4.
articles.local_angle_de: KI-BDR-Tools fur den DACH-Markt. Preise in EUR. Deutsche Sprachunterstutzung.

articles.local_angle_es: Herramientas IA BDR para mercados hispanohablantes. Soporte en espanol.

articles.brief: Pos 9.8 = almost page 1. Honest comparison of 10+ Apollo alternatives. Overloop, Lemlist, Instantly, Saleshandy, Reply.io, Outreach, Salesloft, HubSpot, La Growth Machine. Real feature comparison table. Pricing. Use cases.

articles.brief: DO NOT CHANGE URL. Backlinks: GoDaddy DR93, Etsy DR94, CampaignMonitor DR90. Rewrite as '500+ Email Spam Words to Avoid (2026 Updated List)'. Organize by category: urgency, financial, clickbait, pressure, free. Add Overloop deliverability data if available. Link to spam checker tool.

articles.brief: Zendesk DR93 backlinks (10+ pages). Update with fresh 2026 data. Include real stats from Overloop sends if available. Ideal word count, subject line length, CTA placement. A/B test results.

articles.local_angle_fr: Benchmarks marche FR/BE. Vouvoiement vs tutoiement dans les cold emails.

articles.brief: NEW HUB PAGE for Pillar 2. Buyer's guide format, NOT a listicle. Categories: AI BDR, AI email outreach, AI LinkedIn outreach, AI data enrichment. Each category links to its spoke page. Methodology section: how we evaluated. Comparison table with features/pricing.

articles.brief: REFRAME: 'Cold Email Power Words: 500+ Words That Get Replies in Outbound'. Keep keyword match for 'trigger words' but angle content for cold email/outbound. Organize by emotion: urgency, curiosity, trust, exclusivity. Add examples of each word in cold email context.

articles.brief: GitHub DR97, SEMrush DR92 backlinks. Country-by-country legal guide: US (CAN-SPAM), EU (GDPR), UK (PECR), Canada (CASL), Australia (Spam Act). Include what's legal vs illegal with concrete examples. Compliance checklist.
articles.local_angle_de: Kaltakquise per E-Mail in Deutschland: UWG, DSGVO, Bundesdatenschutzgesetz. Was ist erlaubt im B2B?
articles.local_angle_fr: Cold email en France: RGPD, CNIL, Code de commerce. Ce qui est legal en B2B.
articles.local_angle_es: Email frio en Espana y Latinoamerica: RGPD (UE), LFPDPPP (Mexico), Ley 25.326 (Argentina).

articles.brief: DO NOT CHANGE URL. GoDaddy DR93, OptinMonster DR88 backlinks. Title: 'Cold Email Statistics 2026'. Fresh data: open rates, reply rates, bounce rates, best send times, best days. Include Overloop's own data if available. Infographic-style stats.

articles.brief: Honest review. Disclosure: 'We're Overloop, a competitor.' Real testing for 30 days. Screenshots. Pros AND cons. Where LinkedIn Helper is better, where Overloop is better. Pricing comparison.

articles.local_angle_fr: LinkedIn Helper pour le marche francophone.
